word: H7611 - שְׁאֵרִית - shᵉʼêrîyth - sheh-ay-reeth' - That had escaped

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁארית

Transliteration: she'êrı̂yth

Phonetic: sheh-ay-reeth'

BDB Definition:

  1. rest, residue, remainder, remnant
    1. rest, what is left
    2. remainder, descendants

Origin: from H7604

TWOT entry: 2307b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
